input.company_description: Alternative fuel vehicle systems integrator building propane autogas and electric vehicle solutions for commercial fleets. Division of Roush Enterprises with 2,800+ employees across the parent org. Sells to municipalities, school districts, and logistics companies. Long sales cycles with heavy RFP processes.

pain_points: long RFP-driven sales cycles with municipalities and school districts
competing on government contracts where lowest bid often wins
educating buyers on propane autogas vs EV tradeoffs for fleet conversion
expected_output.reasoning: Enterprise-scale division with budget, but government/RFP sales cycles and public-sector buyers make outbound campaigns less effective than relationship-based selling.

review.notes: Auto-approved after self-review. Moderate fit correct: enterprise budget but government/RFP sales cycles limit outbound effectiveness.
